# Ax = b 可解性及解的结构

```{python}
import sympy as sp

A = sp.Matrix([
    [1, 2, 2, 2],
    [2, 4, 6, 8],
    [3, 6, 8, 10],
])

col_basis = A.columnspace()
print("列空间基：")
sp.pprint(col_basis)
print("列空间维数（秩）：", len(col_basis))
```

[sympy 能解非齐次方程吗？](../appendices/8.md#sympy-能解非齐次方程吗)

[如果要方程组有解，b 需要符合什么条件？](../appendices/8.md#如果要方程组有解b-需要符合什么条件)

```{python}
import sympy as sp

b1, b2, b3 = sp.symbols("b1,b2,b3")

A = sp.Matrix([
    [1, 2, 2, 2, b1],
    [2, 4, 6, 8, b2],
    [3, 6, 8, 10, b3],
])
sp.pprint(A)
print("echelon form: ")
sp.pprint(A.echelon_form())
print("RREF: ")
sp.pprint(A.rref())
```

# 23424

234234
